productDisplayName: Puma Men GP Budg Logo Red Tshirts
description: Composition Red round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, branding on right sleeve, graphic print on the front and print below the nape of the neck Fit Comfort Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry clean Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry German brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This t-shirt from puma is the kind you can't have enough of. This stylish piece is an off-duty must have, pair it with fitted denims and bright canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
